meaning: 埃森[德意志联邦共和国西部城市]
examples: At Essen, though, there is no sign of an industry in stagnation.
One of Germany's big four energy companies is based in Essen; another is in Dusseldorf.
On Saturday 18th September I travelled to Essen in Germany to witness the largest parade of Mazda cars.
Essen-based team Coast have also made their interest known to Ullrich's manager Wolfgang Strohband.
We went to the Old Synagogue in Essen, where my father attended services.
